zh.lifeSummary: 當William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief於1415年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾登維根時，他的父親6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod34歲，母親Margaret Douglas28歲。他於1455年之前與Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾登維根結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1480年在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特托比爾莫利享年65歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易納。

nameMeanings.name: MacLeod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLeod
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Leòid ‘son of Leòd’, a patronymic from a Gaelic form of Old Norse Liótr ‘ugly’, a common personal name in medieval Norway and Iceland.

History: This is the name of a major Scottish Hebridean clan, associated in particular with Dunvegan on the isle of Skye; also, historically, with the island of Lewis. There are two main branches: the McLeods of Harris and Dunvegan (Sìol Tormoid) and the McLeods of Lewis (Sìol Torcaill). Both branches claim descent from a certain Leòd (Norse: Liótr), who lived in the 13th century. — One prominent bearer of this prominent Scottish name, Alexander McLeod (1774–1833), a Reformed Presbyterian clergyman, author, and editor, emigrated to the US in 1792 from the island of Mull in the Hebrides.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Dubh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief was born in 1415, in Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Scotland, his father, 6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod, was 34 and his mother, Margaret Douglas, was 28. He married Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean before 1455, in Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1480, in Tobermory, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief est né en 1415, à Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, 6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret Douglas, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean avant 1455, à Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1480, à Tobermory, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Iona, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief 1415 in Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater 6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod 34 und seine Mutter Margaret Douglas 28. Er hat vor 1455 in Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Scotland Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1480 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Tobermory, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Iona, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief è nato il nel 1415 nel Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, 6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Douglas, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean prima del 1455, nel Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1480, nel Tobermory, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chiefが1415年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアダンベガンで生まれた時，父6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeodは34歳，母Margaret Douglasは28歳であった。1455年以前にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアダンベガンでMargaret ‘Margarate’ MacLeanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1480年にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトトバーモーイで65歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルアイオナにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief(이)가 1415년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 던베건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Douglas(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1455년 이전 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 던베건에서 Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1480년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 토버모리에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 이오나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief nasceu em 1415, em Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, 6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Douglas, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean antes 1455, em Dunvegan, Inverness-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1480, em Tobermory, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Dubh MacLeod 7th Clan Chief родился в 1415 г. в местности дунвеган, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени 6th Chief of Clan MacLeod Iain Borb MacLeod было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Douglas, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret ‘Margarate’ MacLean перед 1455 г. в местности дунвеган, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1480 г. в местности тобирмори, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности иона, аргилл, Шотландия.
